page: Amazon Web Services u7i-12tb.224xlarge is a memory-optimized server designed for workloads requiring massive memory capacity. Powered by dedicated Intel processors with an x86_64 architecture, this instance features 896 virtual CPUs mapped to 448 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core. The processors operate at a baseline speed of 1.9 GHz.

The defining characteristic of this instance is its memory capacity, providing 12288.0 GB of RAM, which equates to approximately 13.71 GB of memory per physical core. It does not include local storage or graphics processing units. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the u7i-12tb.224xlarge represents a highly specialized hardware class with extreme resource density, designed to consolidate massive datasets into memory rather than relying on slower storage tiers. This configuration is optimized for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy real-time data processing workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services u7i-12tb.224xlarge is a memory-optimized server designed for massive enterprise workloads. It features 896 vCPUs across 448 physical Intel cores running at 1.9 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 12288.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 13.71 GB per core. It operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. There is no local storage or GPU hardware bundled with this instance. This server is engineered for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning applications, and memory-intensive data processing tasks that require substantial memory capacity and high-density compute resources without the need for local disk storage or graphics acceleration.
og_description: Amazon Web Services u7i-12tb.224xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 896 vCPUs, 12 TB of RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for massive in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring twelve terabytes of RAM and eight hundred ninety-six virtual CPUs for massive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 12288.0 GB of RAM for massive in-memory database deployments.
896 vCPUs powered by dedicated Intel processors at 1.9 GHz.
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth via the Nitro hypervisor.
Zero local storage and zero GPUs, focusing resources entirely on memory and compute.
Designed for large-scale enterprise resource planning and real-time data processing.
